---
pagetitle: "Jeremy Dubrulle | About"
title: "Jeremy A. Dubrulle"
subtitle: "Do you think phages inspired the Lunar Exploration Module (LEM) ?"
image: photo_light.jpg
image-alt: "Light_painting science"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: assets/img/headshot.webp
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jadeynryan
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jadey-ryan/
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://fosstodon.org/@jadeynryan
      rel: me
    - icon: briefcase-fill
      text: Work
      href: https://agr.wa.gov/AgScience
    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons kofi >}} Support me"
      href: https://ko-fi.com/jadeyryan
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
execute: 
  freeze: true
  
  ::: {#hero-heading}
:::

## Hi there! You're at the right place to learn more about me!

I'm XXX
---
